questions.question: Describe the key differences between IaaS, PaaS, and SaaS cloud computing models. (8 marks)

A cloud provider offers a virtual machine with 2 vCPUs, 4 GB RAM, and 30 GB storage. If the virtual machine is running 10 instances of a web server, what is the total virtual CPU and memory usage? (10 marks)
questions.hint: Calculations for vCPU and memory usage

questions.question: Explain the concept of a cloud provider's resource allocation strategy for virtual machines. How does this impact the performance of cloud-based applications? (12 marks)
